menu_nav_help: ↑/↓: navigate | ←/→/Enter: change value | Esc: Save & Exit
label_active_model: Active Model (read-only - use F2 to change)
webui_desc_contacts: System address book. Provides the AI with native access to contacts, emails, and dates for messaging and automations.
webui_desc_automation: Full PC control: mouse, keyboard, and window management. Use with screenshot for a see-and-act loop.
webui_desc_browser: Hecos AI-controlled Playwright browser. Navigate, read DOM, click elements and fill forms.
webui_style_desc: Customize the look and feel of your Hecos interface. Select a theme that fits your environment.
webui_style_auto_sub: Follow system appearance or time-based switching.
webui_sysnet_proxy_desc: Configure proxy for Hecos backend requests (e.g. Gemini Imagen, cloud AI).
webui_sysnet_proxy_note: Note: Proxy is used internally by Hecos. No system VPN needed. Save first, then Test Connection or ask in chat: 'Proxy status'.
webui_security_ios_title: How to install on iPhone / iPad (iOS):
webui_security_ios_step1: Click the button above and 'Allow' the 'Configuration Profile' download.
webui_security_ios_step2: Open the Settings app on your iPhone. A 'Profile Downloaded' message will appear at the top.
webui_security_ios_step3: Tap it and press Install (you will be asked for your phone's passcode).
webui_security_ios_step4: Go back to Settings > General > About > Certificate Trust Settings (at the bottom).
webui_security_ios_step5: Toggle the switch for Hecos Local Root CA to enable it.
webui_security_ios_step6: Close all Safari/Chrome tabs and reopen Hecos. You will have the green lock!
webui_desc_triggers: PTT via Media Keys (iPhone), Bluetooth & Webhooks
webui_desc_mcp: Universal Protocol Hub (Connect external AI tools via MCP)
webui_desc_editor: Integrated Code & File Editor for Drive
webui_desc_media_viewer: Integrated Media Viewer for Drive (images, video, audio)
webui_welcome_desc: Welcome to the heart of Hecos configuration. Here you can adjust modules, system behavior, and manage AI plugins.
webui_welcome_search_desc: Use the search bar at the top to instantly find any setting.
webui_welcome_save_desc: Changes are persisted automatically as you tweak them.
webui_mp_subtitle: OS-level playback, gallery viewer, and AI playlist management.
webui_mp_no_playlists: No playlists yet. Create one above or ask the AI.
webui_mp_media_root_hint: Default folder for quick scans and autoload playlists.
webui_mp_file_picker_missing: File picker not available. Enter path manually.
webui_mp_clear_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear the Media Vault?
webui_mp_delete_track_confirm: Remove this track from the playlist?
webui_media_vault_desc: Manage images, audio and video generated and saved by Hecos on your default local disk.
webui_telemetry_warning: WARNING: Enabling real-time hardware monitoring may cause instability or performance drops on low-resource systems.
webui_desc_messenger: Send and receive messages via Telegram, WhatsApp, and Discord.
webui_desc_mail: Integrated mail client. Reads SMTP/IMAP profiles, manages drafts, sending, and syncing with automatic provider support and Address Book integration.
webui_desc_lists: Universal list management. Supports shopping lists, tasks, blacklists. Provides priority levels, labels and drag & drop.
sidebar_empty_desc: Add a widget to get started.
